page.title: User Profile
page.description: Manage your birth details to ensure your personalized readings are always accurate.

errors.fixErrors: Please fix the errors before saving
errors.noEmailSession: No email found in session. Please logout and login again.
errors.dstConflict: Your birth time falls during a DST transition. Please select which occurrence was your actual birth time.

securitySection.title: Security Settings
securitySection.description: Manage your password and active sessions.

fields.fullNameHelper: Your full name as per birth certificate
fields.placeOfBirthHelper: Search and select your exact birth location

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.dobInFuture: Birth date cannot be in the future
errors.dobInvalid: Please enter a valid birth date
errors.pobSelectRequired: Please select your exact birth location from the search results

name.label: Full Name
name.hint: Your name as per birth certificate

tob.label: Time of Birth
tob.hint: Pinpoints your ascendant (Lagna) and house cusps

pob.label: Accurate Birth Location
pob.hint: Search your city & select from the dropdown for precise coordinates

mobile.complete: All set! Your celestial profile is complete ✨

sidebar.title: Complete Your Celestial Identity
sidebar.description: Your birth details are the foundation of every cosmic insight — they unlock personalized horoscopes, kundli analysis, and AI-powered Vedic readings.
sidebar.completeMessage: All set! Your celestial profile is complete. Press Save & Continue to return to the dashboard.

security.pageDescription: Manage your password, active sessions, and account data.
security.changePasswordWarning: Changing your password will automatically log you out of all active sessions, including this one.
security.sessionManagementDescription: Log out from all other devices where your account is currently signed in. This device will remain logged in.
security.dangerZoneDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

deleteAccountModal.title: Delete Account
deleteAccountModal.description: This action is permanent and will securely erase all your birth details, generated horoscopes, and preferences. Please confirm with your password to proceed.

logoutConfirmDialog.title: Log Out All Devices?
logoutConfirmDialog.message: This will sign out your account from all other devices. Your current session will remain active.

errors.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.passwordRequired: Please enter your password to confirm deletion.

messages.passwordChanged: Password changed successfully. You will be logged out of all devices.
messages.logoutAllSuccess: Successfully logged out from all other devices.
